BE schema registry — `allTables` array enumerates every Exposed Table in the schema. Each new persistent entity forces exactly one line here. Classical DVT combinatorial anomaly site (data-version transparency is broken at the aggregation point).

One-time AVT-oriented extraction of `URL_MAX_LENGTH` from FindingsTable into a new shared constants file to deduplicate the limit between ProjectPhotos and FindingPhotos tables. Not required by ProjectPhoto itself (the feature could have declared the constant locally); done as cross-feature cleanup during the feature addition. Reclassified from local → collateral (r2) after scope narrowing to `:feat:projects:*` (see `projectphoto-forward_critique.md` §Reclassification note r2).
Removed the local `URL_MAX_LENGTH` const after extracting it to shared DbConstants. Incidental AVT-oriented cleanup forced by the ProjectPhoto addition's need to reuse the same limit.

Per-entity feature-specific Exposed DAO. NEW file created as part of ProjectPhoto's schema. Fails the methodology's recurring test — future features create their own `XxxEntity.kt` files rather than re-editing this one, so this file receives no "similar edit at each future addition". Physically lives in the shared `:feat:shared:database:be:impl` module by centralized BE schema convention (see SoC gravity note in `projectphoto-forward_critique.md` Obs 1), but constitutes local feature content by the strict intrinsic definition. Reclassified intrinsic → local (r3, 2026-04-24); only `AllTables.kt` remains as true recurring DVT. Unit fallback to `:root::non-module` is a drift artifact from the `feat/shared` → `:featuresShared` move in commit dc0d9b8a2 post-b5365d611.

Per-entity feature-specific Exposed `Table` (`project_photos` with FKs). NEW file, not recurring — future entities create their own `XxxTable.kt` files, not re-edits of this one. Physical placement in the shared `:feat:shared:database:be:impl` module is a SoC gravity artifact (centralized BE schema convention), separate from the recurring DVT pattern which is confined to `AllTables.kt`. Reclassified intrinsic → local (r3, 2026-04-24); see `projectphoto-forward_critique.md` Obs 1.

Per-entity feature-specific SQLDelight mirror schema. NEW file, not recurring — future entities create their own `.sq` files, not re-edits of this one. Physical placement in the shared `:feat:shared:database:fe:api` module is a SoC gravity artifact (centralized FE schema convention), not a recurring DVT site. Reclassified intrinsic → local (r3, 2026-04-24); see `projectphoto-forward_critique.md` Obs 1.
